# Fix-brief — [bug-canary-confirmed] PDF export 500

_From GitHub Issue #59 (reporter: remcaro-rgb)._

## Repro outcome
- **Status:** `repro_confirmed`
- **Summary:** ran 6 step(s); the bug is present (4 step(s) failed)
- **Screenshots:**
  - 

## Issue body

Steps:
1. goto: /web/login
2. fill: input[name=login] = admin
3. fill: input[name=password] = admin
4. click: button[type=submit]
5. goto: /odoo/contacts/1
6. click: button[name=action_print_pdf]

Expected: PDF downloads
Actual: 500 page

## Playwright log tail

```
[OK ] goto https://odoo-saas-odoo-agentlab.fly.dev/web/login
[ERR] fill input[name login] = admin — Page.fill: Unexpected token "" while parsing css selector "input[name". Did you mean to CSS.escape it?
Call log:
  - waiting for input[name

[ERR] fill input[name password] = admin — Page.fill: Unexpected token "" while parsing css selector "input[name". Did you mean to CSS.escape it?
Call log:
  - waiting for input[name

[ERR] click button[type=submit] — Page.click: Timeout 60000ms exceeded.
Call log:
  - waiting for locator("button[type=submit]")

[OK ] goto https://odoo-saas-odoo-agentlab.fly.dev/odoo/contacts/1
[ERR] click button[name=action_print_pdf] — Page.click: Timeout 60000ms exceeded.
Call log:
  - waiting for locator("button[name=action_print_pdf]")
```

## Acceptance
- The reproduction steps no longer trigger the symptom.
- A regression test pins the fix.
